title: Seoularian
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Seoularians''' were a race of [[Human/Legends|Humans]] that were resistant to [[Force power/Legends|Force powers]]. They used an [[Seoulian|eponymous language]], and once ruled an area of space from their homeworld [[Seoul 5]]. They were extinct by the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
Though they were wiped out in a cosmic war eons before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], many of their ruined outpost worlds remained, untouched by [[The galaxy/Legends|the wider galaxy]]. In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] their homeworld was discovered simultaneously by an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] party led by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Drezzel]], and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]. Han conjectured that they may have been wiped out by a plague. The interest in the planet was due to three crystals used to power it. The Empire wanted to convert these crystals into weapons. Han prevented this by causing the three crystals to self-destruct, taking much of Seoul 5 with them. Finally, the last of the Seoularian worlds was destroyed.

By the Imperial era, little was known of the Seoularians as a people; however, they did worship Mother Goddess [[Onrai]], thought to be the mistress of the planet [[Coruscant/Legends|Notron]], which the Seoularians believed to be the cradle of Human civilization.
